calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:38am and concluding at 9:50am

Plaintiff Ad Astra Law Group, LLP appearing represented by Katy Young, Esq., via zoom
Defendants Howard Helfant Howard Helfant, Sparx Farms, LLC, and Harkins Grow LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ad Astra Law Group, LLP, and against Defendants Howard Helfant Howard Helfant, Sparx Farms, LLC, and Harkins Grow LLC, as follows:

Damages: $10,666.66
Prejudgment Interest: $821.19
Attorney Fees: $894.00
Costs: $1,399.58

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $13,781.43

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
